issues.title: Deprecated wp-api script handle
issues.description: The script handle 'wp-api' is deprecated in modern WordPress. Should use 'wp-api-fetch' instead which matches the @wordpress/api-fetch package in package.json.
issues.fix: Replace 'wp-api' with 'wp-api-fetch' in the dependencies array.

issues.title: Inefficient transient cache cleanup
issues.description: The transient deletion uses a hardcoded loop from 1-50. This is inefficient and should use wildcard SQL deletion instead.
issues.fix: Replace the for-loop with a single SQL query using LIKE wildcard to delete all cdw_media_cache_* and cdw_posts_cache_* transients.

issues.title: Outdated help text example
issues.description: The help text example shows 'twentytwentyfive' which may become outdated. Should use a placeholder or more generic example.

issues.title: Redundant color validation
issues.description: The validate_hex_color function uses preg_match to validate, then manually adds # prefix. Could be simplified.
issues.fix: Simplify the function to use sanitize_hex_color() WordPress function.

issues.title: Deprecated WP_REST_Server constants
issues.description: WP_REST_Server::READABLE and WP_REST_Server::CREATABLE are deprecated in WordPress 5.5+. Should use 'GET' and 'POST' strings instead.
issues.fix: Replace WP_REST_Server::READABLE with 'GET' and WP_REST_Server::CREATABLE with 'POST'.

issues.title: Redundant nonce verification logic
issues.description: The permission callbacks manually verify nonce but WordPress handles this automatically via the REST API. The check is redundant.
issues.fix: Simplify to rely on WordPress's built-in nonce verification by removing the manual check.

issues.title: Redundant esc_html in nested function call
issues.description: Line 105 has esc_html( __( 'Custom Dashboard Widgets Settings', 'cdw' ) ) - the double translation call is unnecessary.
issues.fix: Change to just esc_html__( 'Custom Dashboard Widgets Settings', 'cdw' ).

issues.title: Unsanitized error message in innerHTML
issues.description: Error message is directly inserted into innerHTML without sanitization. While the risk is low (errors typically come from JavaScript/React), it should use textContent or sanitize the message.
issues.fix: Use textContent instead of innerHTML, or sanitize e.message before inserting.
